title: podman ps --pod <POD_NAME> doesn't work
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

When I execute `podman ps --pod my_pod` it returns a obviously wrong and also unexpected error message: ```Error: `podman ps` takes no arguments ```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman create pod --name my_pod`
1. `podman ps --pod my_pod`

**Describe the results you received:**

```Error: `podman ps` takes no arguments ```

**Describe the results you expected:**

An empty list with an exit code of zero

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

None.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.6.3
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.13.4
Git Commit:         9d087f6a766259ba53b224944f1b7b778035c370-dirty
Built:              Sat Nov 23 12:56:15 2019
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```
